page_title: ✨ Coconut VA Philippine Talent Pool ✨ - Coconut - Application

detector_only: what's your cefr english proficiency level?
list all tools/software/platforms you've had experience with (admin tools, crms, project management platforms, marketing platforms, page builders, etc.). separate entries with a comma.
drop the link to your 1-minute intro video below. broken or dummy links will result in disqualification.
what monthly rate range in usd are you expecting? please be realistic & reasonable with your selection based on experience and location.
how many hours a week can you work?
indicate the specific job code/s you're applying to. separate entries with a comma. if you're submitting a general application, type genapp.
do you prefer being a managed talent or a direct hire?
how did you learn about coconut?
if you were referred, sourced by a head hunter/technical recruiter, or you chose other, please specify. put n/a if you've chosen something else.
have you uploaded a resume following the coconut profile template? (https://bit.ly/cvaprofiletemplate)

do you prefer being a managed talent or a direct hire?
